ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_uid" TEXT /* Unique user ID generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., click, view, sign-in) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the interaction occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location (e.g., city, country) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_interaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type") REFERENCES interaction_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for this session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "session_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the session */,
  "session_device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used during the session */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* User's location during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the interaction entails */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interaction type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic record */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of user interaction */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total count of that interaction type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded analytics */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the analytics record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session associated with the analytics record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was taken */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location if available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session summary */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session this summary is for */,
  "total_interactions" INTEGER /* Total interactions during the session */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date of the session summary */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used during the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import log */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file that was imported */,
  "import_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the import occurred */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the import */,
  "import_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported file */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "import_errors" TEXT /* Any errors that occurred during the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating (e.g., 1-5) given by the user */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who resolved the feedback */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
